info.name: Countdown
info.summary: Manage and display modern and customizable countdowns
info.description:
**Track your most anticipated game releases, movie premieres, and TV episodes — all in one place, fully under your control.**
**Built for Nextcloud**, this app keeps all your data fully private and under your control. Your events and most anticipated releases stay exclusively on your instance — no tracking, no profiling, no third-party access.
* 🕒 **Track countdowns for games, movies, series, and more.** * 📊 **View all your upcoming releases in a clear dashboard.** * 🔄 **Repeat events daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly.** * 🔔 **Receive notifications directly through Nextcloud.** * 🖼️ **Switch between multiple layouts to fit your style.** * 📱 **Install as a PWA and use it like a native app.** * 🎮 **Discover subtle easter eggs inspired by pop culture.**
Organize events by creation date, follow recurring schedules (perfect for conventions, releases, or personal reminders), and access everything instantly through the integrated Dashboard widget.
**Modern, responsive, and optimized for both light and dark themes**, the app is designed to feel natural within the entire Nextcloud ecosystem — whether you’re an individual user, a privacy enthusiast, or part of a larger organization managing deadlines, releases, and scheduled events.
info.author: Felt
